name: Excelpoint Technology Ltd.
summary: Excelpoint Technology Ltd., an investment holding company, provides electronic components, and engineering design, and supply chain management services. The company is involved in the trading of electronic components; and provision of marketing and technical support services. It offers wireless connectivity and DSP audio enhancement implementation solutions that are used in portable wireless speakers, wireless music headphones, mini combos, sound bar and wireless subwoofers, and audio transmitter dongles; wearable devices and accessories for iPhone and iPad; solutions of Bluetooth enabled massage chairs and lost-and-found tags; and entry-level and mid-tier platforms for wearables and smart accessories applications. The company also provides automotive solutions, including the development of reference car infotainment systems and core boards, which support GPS for navigation, video playback, Bluetooth headset and handfree, Bluetooth music streaming, rearview camera, etc.; connectivity solutions, such as BLE, Bluetooth, BLE/Bluetooth combo, embedded Wi-Fi, and sub-Ghz modules for smart homes; headset solutions; Qualcomm, a smart audio platform; and electric power quality analyzer systems. In addition, it offers Internet of Things solutions for smart buildings, smart agriculture and smart infrastructure. It serves original equipment manufacturers, original design manufacturers, and electronics manufacturing service providers in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, Southeast Asia, India, and internationally. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Singapore.
